emails.subject: Re: Core/Non-Core - California
emails.body: Jeff, Marty Sunde asked me to get ahold of you as soon as possible to discuss likely exit fee scenarios. Could we talk today? Thanks, Kevin Keeney 713-345-3724 Forwarded by Kevin Keeney/HOU/EES on 06/15/2001 08:24 AM Enron Energy Services From: Marty Sunde 06/14/2001 08:05 PM Phone No: 713-853-7797
